problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: Combining DNA computing for massively parallel search with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
